sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
OK so the yellow positions are:
- id=110, color=Y, bounds=[55,56]x[20,22] - yellow in gray panel (right side, top)
- id=111, color=Y, bounds=[57,59]x[8,9] - yellow in blue panel (left side, bottom)
Looking at the image, the gray panel is on the left (with yellow at top) and the blue panel is on the right (with yellow at bottom). Wait, that doesn't match the segmentation.
Let me look at the image more carefully:
- Left bottom panel: gray border, black background, yellow shape at bottom
- Right bottom panel: blue border, black background, yellow shape at top
So the gray panel is on the left and the blue panel is on the right. The yellow in the gray panel is at the bottom (rows 57-59, cols 8-9), and the yellow in the blue panel is at the top (rows 55-56, cols 20-22).
Wait, but the segmentation says:
- id=110, color=Y, bounds=[55,56]x[20,22] - this is at rows 55-56, cols 20-22 (right panel area)
- id=111, color=Y, bounds=[57,59]x[8,9] - this is at rows 57-59, cols 8-9 (left panel area)
So the yellow in the left panel (gray) is at (58, 8) and the yellow in the right panel (blue) is at (56, 21).
Looking at the image:
- Left bottom panel: gray border, yellow at bottom → (58, 8)
- Right bottom panel: blue border, yellow at top → (56, 21)
So the gray panel is on the left and the blue panel is on the right. The yellow in the gray panel is at (58, 8) and the yellow in the blue panel is at (56, 21).
Now, the question is: what does clicking the yellow in the gray panel do? Based on previous observations:
1. Clicking the yellow in the gray panel clears the bottom row of the left panel (converts "w" to "B").
2. Clicking the yellow in the gray panel swaps the panels.
In the current state, the left panel has:
- 4 rows of "w" buttons (rows 35-37, 39, 41-43, 45)
- 1 row of "B" buttons (rows 47-49)
If I click the yellow in the gray panel, it would clear the bottom row of the left panel. But the bottom row is already "B", so it would... un-clear it (convert "B" to "w")?
Let me test this by clicking the yellow in the gray panel at (58, 8).
Actually, wait. I need to be careful about which panel is which. The left panel is the gray panel, and the right panel is the blue panel. The yellow in the gray panel is at (58, 8).
Let me click the yellow in the gray panel at (58, 8) to see what happens.
